title: OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About OLX India Asia Pacific Associates:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India Asia Pacific Associates!
